studies.title: Evaluation of a smartphone app for patients with panic disorder with or without comorbid agoraphobia

_verification.reason: The study specifically evaluates the app 'mindable', which is a digital health application for panic disorder and agoraphobia. The app is developed by Mindable Health GmbH, matching the manufacturer of Mindable: Soziale Phobie.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a multicenter randomized controlled trial where participants are randomly assigned to either an app group or a waiting control group, which is a defining feature of an RCT.
